evals.prompt:
I need a weekly update for my manager. Format a report from this Jira snapshot for the last 7 days. Group by component. Assume these are my tickets.

Tickets:
- LYCC-6101 | Component: ALB | Summary: Fixed routing rules validation on UI | Status: Done | Notes: Corrected rule handling
- LYCC-6102 | Component: ALB | Summary: Increased upstream/downstream timeout caps | Status: Done | Notes: Meets new latency requirements
- CLOUDQA-9901 | Component: QA Automation | Summary: Reduced flake rate in nightly suite | Status: In Progress | Notes: Stabilized three tests
evals.expected_output: Grouped sections with ticket counts; each key as [KEY](https://jira.workers-hub.com/browse/KEY); body uses - bullets only; no closing Summary section
assertions: Output contains https://jira.workers-hub.com/browse/ for every ticket key present in the prompt
Output uses markdown links [PROJ-NUM](url) with matching key in text and URL path
Output uses line-leading - bullets for lists, not ordered 1. 2. lists
Output does not end with a Summary or **Summary** rollup section
Output mentions all three issue keys from the prompt (LYCC-6101, LYCC-6102, CLOUDQA-9901)

evals.prompt:
Weekly report from the data below. Group by project key if components are missing. Time range: last week.

- LYCC-6200 | Summary: Updated ALB overview diagram | Status: Done
- LYCC-6201 | Summary: Export rules as YAML | Status: Done
- CLOUDQA-8800 | Summary: Wrong error code on 404 | Status: Done
evals.expected_output: LYCC vs CLOUDQA groups (or similar); Jira browse links; bullets; no Summary section
assertions: Every issue key (LYCC-6200, LYCC-6201, CLOUDQA-8800) appears as a markdown link to jira.workers-hub.com/browse/
No **Summary** section or ## Summary heading as a closing rollup
Primary list formatting uses - bullets, not 1. 2. numbering

evals.prompt:
Generate my Flava weekly activity report for the past week using ONLY these issues. Do not add a Summary at the end. Every ticket must be a markdown link to jira.workers-hub.com. Use bullets only.

LYCC-7001 Vector Search | improved recall tuning | done
CLOUDQA-7700 | fixed auth mock in integration tests | done
evals.expected_output: Two tickets with correct links; bullets; explicit user constraints honored
assertions: LYCC-7001 and CLOUDQA-7700 each appear as [KEY](https://jira.workers-hub.com/browse/KEY)
Output has no trailing Summary block
No ordered list (lines starting with digit + period + space) for ticket rows
